nodes.title: Model Links
widgets_values:
- Huggingface: [Lightricks/LTX-2.3](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/)
- Github: [LTX-2](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2)

## LTX-2.3 Prompting Tips

1. **Core Actions**: Describe events and actions as they occur over time  
2. **Visual Details**: Describe all visual details you want to appear in the video  
3. **Audio**: Describe sounds and dialogue needed for the scene

## Report LTX-2.3 Issues
To report any issues when running this workflow, [go to GitHub](https://github.com/Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo/issues)

## Model Links (for Local Users)

**checkpoints**

- [ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3-fp8/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors)

**loras**

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors)
- [gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/loras/gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors)

**latent_upscale_models**
- [ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 checkpoints/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │   ├── ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors
│   │   └── gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 latent_upscale_models/
│       └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors
```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud updates follow stable releases, so some nightly-supported models may not be available yet.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)
blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles, pregnant, obese, scene cuts,

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: A handcrafted felt cutout cinematic diorama style made entirely from soft felt materials with visible stitching, layered felt shapes, fuzzy edges, embroidered details, and plush handcrafted textures, lit with soft cinematic lighting and gentle shadows, depicts a plump, chartreuse-bodied felt snail with a spiraled saffron-yellow felt shell slowly gliding across a massive, deep crimson felt poppy petal in a vibrant felt cutout flower garden under golden morning sunlight. The snail's elongated body is constructed from soft, rounded felt layers, its two plush antennae, tipped with tiny, round black embroidered eyes, slowly twitch and extend forward with gentle, fabric-like movement, constantly exploring. Its saffron-yellow shell, crafted from tightly spiraled and stitched felt strips, catches soft highlights from the morning sun, creating subtle shadows between its felt layers and showcasing its plush handcrafted construction. The camera slowly pushes forward, then subtly tracks alongside the snail, revealing a dense foreground of blurred, layered felt leaves and a background of softly diffused felt garden foliage with fuzzy edges, all constructed from stacked and layered felt cutouts. The enormous crimson poppy petal, with its hand-cut irregular edges and visible embroidered veins, gently sways from side to side as a soft breeze rustles through the surrounding felt grass and leaves in the midground, causing a single, shimmering felt dewdrop resting on the petal's surface to quiver. The snail, with a gentle, curious expression on its tiny embroidered face, slowly extends its mouthpart towards the dewdrop, and as it makes contact with a soft slurping sound, its tiny eyes crinkle slightly as it looks down, and a soft, delighted voice whispers, "Oh, what a lovely sip!" The air is filled with the faint, gentle chirping of unseen felt birds and the whisper of the moving felt foliage, creating a warm, whimsical, and comforting storybook-like mood. Every surface, from the snail's plush body to the poppy's velvety petals and the layered felt pebbles in the distance, showcases visible stitched seams, soft fuzzy fibers, and embroidered decorative details, making the entire scene feel tactile and dimensionally handcrafted.

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
